resources:
DoneBot Back Summary Great work! Focus Sessions Total Focus Break Time Start Again Edit Settings Configure Pomodoro Timer End Session End Session? Are you sure you want to finish your Pomodoro session early? Keep Going Customize your focus session Total session time: %1$d min Manage What To Do The smartest way to manage what you have to do. Plan clearly. Track easily. Never forget what matters. Continue as a Guest Already have an account? Login Login Home Activity Calendar Task Done Task Pending No tasks today Create a new task to get started Nothing scheduled No personal tasks or group deadlines on this day in %1$dh %2$dm Unassigned · still pending Completed
%1$d day left
%1$d days left
%1$d hour ago
%1$d hours ago
%1$d minute ago
%1$d minutes ago
%1$d day ago
%1$d days ago
My Tasks Recurring Tasks Group Tasks Done Pending Overdue Task Done Task Pending Tasks Today Add New Task Task Details Edit Task Details Secret Mode Settings Secret Mode Active Secret Mode Inactive Auto-disable after Save Preference" Close Button Task Title Set time Plan Your Day Task Date When do you want to get notified? Starts Ends Task Description Create Task Update Task Save Changes Cancel OK Only the assignee or an admin can complete this task Only admins can edit this task Profile Change photo Photos Add photo Delete photo? Do you want to remove this photo from the task? Can\'t add photos until the task is synced Photo will upload when the task is synced Failed to upload photo This task is secret — tap to reveal
Group name cannot be empty Failed to save changes Member removed Failed to remove member Please fill in all required fields Task added to group Failed to create task Invite sent successfully Share link feature coming soon Ownership transferred Failed to transfer ownership Profile updated Failed to update profile Photo updated Failed to upload avatar Failed to delete photo Google login error Assign to a group ToDo App Failed to load task Something went wrong Move Up Move Down Now Until the app is closed Home Settings Search Notification Task Statistics Activity Yearly Progress %1$d done · %2$d pending this week Year so far: %1$d done ✅ Include recurring tasks ↑ %1$d%% vs last week ↓ %1$d%% vs last week Same as last week %1$d-day streak 🔥 No streak yet — complete a task today Most productive: %1$s · %2$d tasks Where you focused this week Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday Sunday Mo Tu We Th Fr Sa Su Settings Change App Theme Change Language English EN Turkish TR Saved Successfully Changes Not Saved Changes Discarded Title is required Title is too short Add Timer More Next Pause Start Skip Advanced Settings Retry Secret Task Authentication Failed Biometric Authentication Log in using your biometric credential Privacy & Security The time of reopening for secret mode Save Disable Secret Mode logo Join us and start organizing your tasks efficiently! Sign Up with Google OR Full Name Email Password toggle password visibility Confirm Password Sign Up "Already have an account? " Login Logout Logout Are you sure you want to logout? DONEBOT Elevate your productivity Welcome Back Please sign in to your account Email Address name@example.com OR CONTINUE WITH Google Don\'t have an account? Register Your password is too weak Your password is medium Your password is strong Email cannot be blank Invalid email address Password cannot be blank Password must be at least %1$d characters long Forgot Password Recover Access Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password. Send Reset Link "Remember your password? " Back to Login If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent. Reset Password Password reset — please sign in with your new password. This reset link is invalid or has expired. Change Password Current Password New Password Confirm New Password Current password is incorrect Passwords do not match New password must differ from the current one Password changed successfully Update the password used to sign in to your account. Choose a new password for your account. You will need to sign in again afterwards. Close Something went wrong Unknown error Task not found Failed to load tasks Delete task? Task deleted Group task deleted Do you want to delete the task? Delete group? Do you want to delete this group? Group deleted Delete Groups New Group My Groups Let\'s get started Bring your group together in one place Group Name Edit Group Details e.g. The Johnsons, Summer Vacation What is this group for? Collaborating on chores, planning trips, or daily tasks... You\'ll be able to invite your group members and assign tasks to them immediately after creating the group. Create You don\'t have any groups yet. Create a group to start collaborating on tasks with your family. Create New Group Login to create a group Login or Create Account Create Account Notify me at %1$s Plan time saved \"I will notify you when clock hits!\" \"You can always edit your task details.\" Swipe a task left to delete it Swipe a task right to mark it as secret — fingerprint required Long press a task card to drag and reorder your list Tap the + button to create a new task with time and description You can mark a task as secret while creating it via Advanced Settings Use the Calendar tab to view tasks across a custom date range Visit the Activity tab to track your weekly and yearly progress Tap any task card to view and edit its full details Set a daily planning reminder in Settings → Plan Your Day Create groups to organise and share tasks with others Switch between light, dark or system theme in Settings Use the Pomodoro timer to stay focused — tap the timer button Tap any day in the weekly picker to jump to that day\'s tasks Your weekly completed and pending task counts are always shown at the top Long press and drag groups to reorder them in the Groups tab Attach photos when creating a task — the first one shows on the card Tap a group task card to flip it and see who it\'s assigned to Swipe a group task right to take it yourself, or to give it back if it\'s already yours Group tasks can be marked HIGH, MEDIUM or LOW — the badge shows in the top-right Tap your avatar in the top bar to edit your name and change your photo Admins can upload a custom avatar for their group in Group Settings When a Pomodoro session is running, a timer banner stays at the top of every screen Group admins can hand over ownership to another member from Group Settings Search looks through your personal tasks and every group you\'re in at once Long-press a group task card to open the edit sheet — admins only Deleted a task by mistake? Hit Undo in the snackbar before it slides away Switch between English and Türkçe in Settings → Language Tip Pull down for a helpful tip Release for your tip Tasks Done Pending Done Tasks Pending Tasks No tasks this week Tasks will appear here once created Oldest Newest Type to search your tasks Type to search tasks and groups No tasks found for \"%1$s\" Tasks Groups No groups found for \"%1$s\" All Tasks Groups Group Tasks Filter Filters (%1$d) Filters Show Category Recurrence Status Date Any Pending Completed One-off Any time Today This week This month Clear all Apply Pomodoro Timer Your current settings Sessions Focus Short Break Long Break Session Count Sessions per Cycle Focus Time min Duration ~%1$d min total %1$d sessions · %2$dm focus · %3$dm / %4$dm breaks Pomodoro Focus Short Break Long Break Overtime %1$d min %1$dm Add Task Move Up Move Down Group Detail Group Settings Invite Member Manage Members Member Profile Remove from Group Remove Member Are you sure you want to remove this member from the group? Member not found Failed to load member Failed to remove member Transfer Ownership Overview Members Activity No tasks yet. Create your first task to get started! + New Task All Assigned to Me Invite Remove Grow your family group Collaborate on tasks and stay organized together. Send Invite The user must already be registered to receive the invite. User must already be registered with the app to join instantly. Or share invite link Add Member Invite to Family Send an invite to add a new member to your family circle. They\'ll be able to see and manage shared tasks. Please enter a valid email address CURRENT MEMBERS Tap on a member to view details, change roles, or remove them from the group. Select a member to pass admin rights to. You will become a regular member. FAMILY MEMBERS Search members… This action cannot be undone. MANAGEMENT Add or remove people Pass admin rights Delete Group This action cannot be undone. All group data will be lost. Group Description Group Name All caught up Tasks Pending Done Pending ADMIN MEMBER Joined member@example.com Group settings saved Invite sent successfully Group deleted Something went wrong. Please try again. Due Today Due %1$d mins ago %1$d hours ago Yesterday %1$d days ago Task Detail Assign to Me Unassign task Assign to No Assignee No due date Failed to delete task Failed to update task Task title cannot be empty Task updated successfully Edit Task Assignee Priority None Status You Assign to Me Are you sure you want to assign this task to yourself? Assign Stay on top of your tasks Allow notifications so reminders reach you on time. See your daily plan on top Let the app draw over other apps to show your daily plan card. Task title is required Please pick a date Please set start and end time End time must be after start time Notifications You\'re all caught up Mark all as read Couldn\'t mark notifications as read Invitations No pending invitations Invited by %1$s Accept Decline Joined the group Invitation declined Couldn\'t complete that action Appearance Reminders Productivity Privacy Account Push notifications Exact reminders Allow this app to fire reminders at the precise time you set. Exact reminders are enabled. Today Earlier All notifications marked as read New activity from your groups will appear here. Just now Join group? You\'ll be added to %1$s and the inviter will be notified. Decline invitation? We\'ll let %1$s know you decided not to join. When someone invites you to a group, you\'ll see it here. Keep
%1$d member
%1$d members
Remind me No reminder On time 1 min before 30 min before 1 hour before 3 hours before 6 hours before 12 hours before 1 day before Alarm sound No alarm sounds available
Group invitation %1$s invited you to %2$s You\'ve been invited to %1$s Invitation accepted %1$s joined %2$s Invitation declined %1$s declined to join %2$s New task assigned %1$s was assigned to you Task completed %1$s completed “%2$s” Task due soon %1$s is due soon in %2$s Pomodoro Live Timer Live countdown for the active Pomodoro session Session %1$d of %2$d Pause Resume Skip Focus session complete Paused · %1$s %1$d:%2$02d Alarm Overlay Background notice while an alarm overlay is shown Showing reminder
Category Shopping Medicine Health Work Study Birthday Personal Other Custom name
Repeat Don\'t repeat Every day Every week Every month Every year Reminds every day at the chosen time ! Reminds on the same weekday at the chosen time ! Reminds on the same day of the month ! Reminds on the same date every year !
Today Daily Weekly Monthly Yearly
Daily Tasks Weekly Tasks Monthly Tasks Yearly Tasks
